name: Israel Government Data MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Israel's government open data portal (data.gov.il) — enabling AI agents to search, query, and retrieve datasets from the Israeli government's CKAN-based open data platform. Provides access to public datasets on demographics, economy, transportation, health, environment, and more from Israeli government agencies.
use_cases: Querying Israeli government statistics and demographic data from research agents
Accessing public transportation and infrastructure data from urban planning agents
Retrieving economic and business datasets from analysis agents
Searching environmental and health datasets from policy research agents
Building data journalism applications with Israeli public data from media agents
Academic research using Israeli government open datasets from research agents
not_for: Non-Israeli government data (use appropriate national data portal MCPs)
Real-time Israeli government data (open data portal is batch-updated)
Classified or non-public Israeli government information
best_when: Researchers, journalists, or analysts needing to query Israeli open government data — the CKAN-based portal provides structured access to hundreds of public datasets.
avoid_when: You need real-time Israeli government data or classified information — open data portal only has public batch-updated datasets.

auth.notes: No authentication required — data.gov.il is a public open data portal. CKAN API is publicly accessible without API key for read operations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — public government open data
pricing.notes: Free open government data. MCP server is free and open source.

performance.rate_limits: CKAN API: informal rate limits; avoid high-frequency queries on public portal

known_agent_gotchas: Some datasets available only in Hebrew — agents may need translation for Hebrew content
CKAN API response formats vary by dataset — agents must handle schema variation
Dataset quality varies across government agencies — validate data before use
Large datasets require pagination — implement offset-based pagination for full retrieval
Portal uptime depends on Israeli government IT — occasional maintenance windows
CKAN API is standard but dataset-specific metadata may be inconsistent
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public government open data. No credentials. HTTPS. Data stored in Israel (IL data residency). No personal data concerns for public aggregate datasets. Open license — check individual dataset licenses.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public data portal. No credentials required. HTTPS. Open government data — check individual dataset licenses for usage rights.
